conventions: Peer-multiple relative valuation — fair value is the average of the per-multiple implied prices. Valuation only — no live market price is used.

drivers.label: EPS $115
drivers.comment: Middle of a split FY2027 consensus (~$98 to ~$150). This forward figure is the main swing factor.

drivers.label: P/E 10×
drivers.comment: A premium to peers' ~5× — for MU's US listing, better shareholder returns, and an AI-memory re-rating.

drivers.label: EV/EBITDA 8×
drivers.comment: Roughly in line with peers (~8×) and MU's own long-run median.

drivers.label: P/B 4×
drivers.comment: Book value is a weak yardstick here — MU's very high ROE means a peer-like P/B understates it, so this row reads as a floor.
